title: FBI Case File 62-HQ-83894 (1947-1968)
summary: FBI headquarters master file aggregating 18 separate UAP-related incidents across two decades, including Roswell-era field office reporting.

audience.tldr: FBI investigative document from a Bureau case file documenting a UAP encounter (1947-1968) over United States, multiple locations.
what_we_know: Reported location: United States, multiple locations.
what_we_dont: Redacted portions may contain identifying or technical detail.
No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation is technically possible but has not been demonstrated.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 53/100. Top drivers: witness credibility (federal_agent), corroboration (multi_witness_no_instrument).
